posts.text:
Communities of color are 3x more likely to live in nature-deprived areas than white communities—and it's not by accident. 

Learn more about the nature gap: americanprogress.org/article…

Video

Despite Trump's claims, no one is "winning" in his war of choice with Iran. In fact, American taxpayers are losing billions of dollars.

Video

“Gun violence is the number one cause of death for young people—and that is unacceptable.” Take action and join the work in your community today.

Video

If the Trump administration truly cared about delivering lower gasoline and energy prices to Americans, here are 4 actions it could take instead of increasing profits for the oil industry. ⬇️ 
ampr.gs/4rql1DT

NEW: This week, Senior Fellow Tom Moore explained how Minnesotans can make Citizens United irrelevant and get dark money out of politics.

Video
Iranian-made drones are changing how wars are fought. To defeat them, the U.S. should look to Ukraine. More from CAP's @robertbenson92 and Luke Zahner for @starsandstripes: tinyurl.com/3w6vnbd7

Instead of proposing solutions to the skyrocketing energy prices Americans face as a result of President Trump’s war of choice with Iran, the administration has put forward ideas that benefit the oil and gas industry. ampr.gs/4rql1DT

The Medigap trap is a predictable—and reversible—result of policy choices. CAP's new report outlines reforms that would both prevent beneficiaries from falling into the Medigap trap and offer a way out for those already in it. ampr.gs/3OYXV9V

President Trump said the quiet part out loud. The SAVE Act that Trump is pushing will deny millions of Americans their right to vote.

Video
President Trump’s war with Iran is exposing how Europe has grown too divided and too dependent to resist an increasingly coercive transatlantic alliance. americanprogress.org/article…

Moving beyond the failures of the Trump administration, the U.S. will need to embrace a strategy for fighting the climate crisis that prioritizes support for working people and establishes a precedent for international collaboration. ampr.gs/4dfNrwG

Americans are paying for Trump's war in Iran, here at home. From gasoline to electricity to food, learn how the war is impacting your wallet.

Video

Starting NOW: "Diplomatic Malpractice: The Trump Administration’s Failure To Protect and Evacuate U.S. Embassies and Citizens in the Middle East." Watch live online ⤵️ 
nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1oJMvRdNR…

The people united will never be defeated ✊📣 When we raise our voices together in non-violent protest, change is possible. Join a #NoKings protest near you on Saturday, March 28th. nokings.org/

Video

As long as the Trump administration's reckless war in Iran continues—and perhaps for some time thereafter—American households will pay higher prices at the pump, on their utility bills, and on their grocery bills. ampr.gs/4sF1Nva

Recent reports of prediction market bets made ahead of surprise government actions point to potentially corrupt use of insider information for personal profit—Congress must put an end to this practice. americanprogress.org/article…
